docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFICA, FELICIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO:DEFENDANT (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT THE NORMANDY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFICA, FELICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE NORMANDY $1,664.66 PRINCIPAL, $10.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,674.66, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
